reasoning: Although Anthropic briefly reached #1 on the LMArena leaderboard in early October 2025 with their Claude 4.5 Sonnet and Claude 4.1 Opus models, the Polymarket price of 4% on October 16 is a very strong signal that they are not expected to hold this position until December 31. Anthropic has largely played its hand for late 2025 by releasing its 4.5 generation in September and October. The fast-moving AI landscape means that holding the #1 spot for three months without a major new release is extremely unlikely, particularly with rumors of OpenAI and Google readying their next major tier of models (e.g., updates to GPT-5 or Gemini 3) for the end of the year. While Anthropic has the alphabetical advantage in the event of a tie, the likelihood of them retaining the outright #1 position or remaining in a tie against fresh frontier models from competitors in Q4 is very slim. I estimate a 5% probability, strictly aligning with the market's high confidence of an impending SOTA release from Google or OpenAI.
